thinking: I face a sparse cafe/kitchen area with a yellow table and chairs on the left, cabinets, sink, stove hood, pots, and a refrigerator along the back wall; a woman customer sits at the table. The customer leans forward, places weight on the table/chair, and rises from her seat, moving toward the camera and then out of frame to the left. As clerk, I shift my view and walk/pan rightward away from the table, leaving the customer behind and orienting toward the open floor and the partition near the kitchen fixtures. The final view centers more on the partition wall, refrigerator, sink, and counter area, with the table and chairs partly cropped at the left edge.
caption: CLERK: Intent was to leave the seated customer area and move toward the back/kitchen side, achieved by turning right and walking toward the partition and appliances. CUSTOMER: Intent appeared to be to get up and approach or depart from the table, expressed by leaning forward, pushing up from the chair/table, standing, and moving left past the camera.
